deploymentAssumptions: V2 is not deployed by the canonical manifest.
Every public-network privileged address must be explicit.
The deployer must retain no unintended privileged role.
The vesting vault is prefunded before schedules reserve liabilities.
No transaction is part of independent-review package generation.
outOfScope: Canonical V1 deployed bytecode and source semantics
Private keys, RPC secrets, and signer identities
Legal, tax, regulatory, property, or hospitality operator conclusions
Website, analytics, and operator sandbox except where they affect public claims
